name: econovaria
description: Repository-wide validation and production-readiness tooling for Econovaria.

scripts.audit: npm run audit:migrations && npm run audit:architecture && npm run audit:assets && npm run audit:admin-contracts
scripts.test: npm run audit && npm run test:deployment-readiness && npm run test:admin-mounted-event && npm run test:admin-redemptions && npm run test:admin-game-lifecycle && npm run test:player-runtime-cutover && node scripts/admin-session-manager-smoke.mjs && node scripts/admin-shell-smoke.mjs && node scripts/admin-v606-full-drift-audit.mjs
